title: RTP - Simple RTP
body:
A simple RTP plugin.

If you have any recommendations, feel free to DM me (@58techboyfr).

Make sure to checkout **[BreezeNodes](https://discord.gg/YmxBd2GebB)**!


**/rtp**

![/rtp](https://cdn.58techboy.co.uk/u/TaQ7nP.png)

**RTP GUI**

![RTP GUI](https://cdn.58techboy.co.uk/u/1lptLV.png)

GUI can be toggled and edited.

Permissions

```
simplertp.* Grants all Simple RTP Permissions
simplertp.rtp Allows user to run /rtp
simplertp.world.(worldname) Allows user to teleport to a specific world
simplertp.gui Allows user to run /rtpgui
```

You can change the radius, world, teleportation noise, cooldown, messages etc in the config files.

![config](https://cdn.58techboy.co.uk/u/Jtk913.png)
